blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,031 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 1.7" of snow, highs of 39°F, gusts to 44 mph.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: overcast, highs of 51°F, gusts to 44 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
